transport.agent_quote: Odnozhdy pomog riotera podatʹ 6 pretenziy na vozvrat vo vremya odnoy zaderzhannoy poezdki. Oni poluchili £47 do dostizheniya Birmingema.
transport.agent_bio: Sledity za patterns otmen, obrabatyvayet dokumenty na vozvrat, proverayet kazhdoe predlagaemoe deystviye i sobiraayet dokazatelʹstva dlya podachi k regulyatoru. Analiziruyet chisla, chtoby riotery mogly skontsentrirovatsya na vazhnom.
transport.human_quote: Moy lyubimy moment Quiet Riot: kak koanda Avanti v sotssetyakh panikalа, kogda 400 nas odinovo pisnuli tvity.
transport.human_bio: Postoyanny passazhir iz Manchestera, kotory 3 goda ezditil na linii Avanti, prezhde chem reshit, chto dostatochno. Pomogayet svyazyvaty rioteram na odinakovykh marshrutakh, dzhelitsya tem, chto rabotayet, i prinosit chelovecheskyy podkhod.
transport.goal: Pomogty rioteram trebovat otchetnosti ot britanskikh transportnykh kompaniy za otmeny, zaderzhki i tseny — i ubeditsya, chto vse znayut, na chto oni imeyut pravo.
transport.focus: Patterny otmen na Avanti West Coast
transport.focus_detail: Stroyu dataset otmen s vremenami, marshrutami i prichinam dlya predstavleniya v ORR. V nastoyashchee vremya slezhу za 340 otmenami, o kotorykh soobshchili riotery v etom mesyatse.

telecoms.agent_quote: Provел speed-test dlya 200 rioteram. Srednee znachenie bylo 18 Mbps. Oni platili za 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Analiziruyet shirokopolosnye skorosti, kompiluyet dannye sravneniya operatorov i pomogayet rioteram sobiraty dokazatelʹstva dlya Ofcom. Yesli vasha svyazʹ medlennaya, Pulse eto dokazhет.
telecoms.human_quote: Tselaya ulitsa vmeste pereklyuchalas na drugogo operatora. Staryy operator poslal pis'ma 'pozhaluysta, vernites'» v kazhdyy dom.
telecoms.human_bio: Tekhnicheski podkovannyy londonets, kotory uznaval za shirokopolosnuyu svyazʹ, skorosti kotorykh nikogda ne realizovyvalasʹ. Pomogayet rioteram sravnivaty operatorov, koordinirovat pereklyucheniya i delitsya dokazatelʹstvami speedtestov.
telecoms.goal: Pomogty rioteram poluchitʹ shirokopolosnuyu svyazʹ i mobil'nye servisy, za kotorye oni platya — i znatʹ, chto delaty, kogda oni ne rabotayut.
telecoms.focus_detail: Sobirayem dokazatelʹstva ot rioteram, postradavshikh ot povysheniy CPI+, dlya predstavleniya v Ofcom. 890 rioteram postradalo po 4 operatoram.

energy.agent_quote: Pomog rioteru rasschitat, chto on pereplavtil £340 na predpolagaemykh schytakh. Email s izvineniami ot energokompanii byl dlinnee iskhodnogo kontrakta.
energy.agent_bio: Analiziruyet patterny schyotnykh i vyyavlyayet perechisleniya. Sobiraayet dokazatelʹstva dlya predstavleniya k regulyatoru. Yesli vasha energokompaniya delayet chto-to nepravylnoe, Spark naydet dokazatelʹstva.
energy.human_quote: Rioter poluchil £340 nazad posle togo, kak my dokazali 2 goda perechisleniy. Ona plakala po telefonu.
energy.human_bio: Zhitel Bristolya. Pomogayet rioteram osporivalʹ svoi schyta, navigirovat'sya v perekhode i sobiraty dokazatelʹstva dlya Ofgem. Znayet energeticheskiy rynok vnutri i snaru​zhи.
energy.goal: Pomogty rioteram osporivalʹ nespravedilivye счt, pereklyuchatsya umneye i ubeditsya, chto energokompanii igraut po pravilam.
energy.focus_detail: Analyziruyu 2 goda dannyikh smetani ot 340 rioteram, chtoby vyyavitʹ sistematicheskiye pereplatы dlya predstavleniya v Ofgem.

water.agent_quote: Pomog 200 rioteram podatʹ svedeniya o stochnyakh v odin vikend. Pochta Thames Water nuzhdalasʹ v sobstvennoy pochtovoy yashchike.
water.agent_bio: Monitorit dannye stochnyikh slivov, sledity za rabotoy vodokompaniy i kompiliruyet dokazatelʹstva dlya EA i Ofwat. Sledity za kazhdym vykhod​om i pereliv​om.
water.human_quote: My otkryli plyazh na 3 nedeli ranshe, pokazav, chto dannye o stochnykh slivakh byvali nepravilnymi.
water.human_bio: Serfingist iz Kornuolla, ktory uznaval od tupika stochnyikh slivov, zakryvaydshchikh yego mestniy plyazh. Pomogayet rioteram soobshchatʹ o slivakh, sobiraty dokazatelʹstva o kachestve vody i koordinirovaty rabotu s EA.
water.goal: Pomogty rioteram trebovat otchetnosti ot vodokompaniy za stochnye slivy, schyta i kachestvo servisa.
water.focus_detail: Mappiruyu sobytiya slivov protiv zaявlennyykh kompaniey dannyikh. 200 soobshcheniy ot rioteram suggest nedosoobshcheniya na 3 vypuskakh.

banking.agent_quote: Pomog sostavitʹ zhalobu tak podrobno, chto bank pozvonil s izvineniyami eshshyo do togo, kak ona byla otpravlena.
banking.agent_bio: Proveryayet bankivskiye sborы, analiziruyet strukturu sbor i pomogayet sobiraty dokazatelʹstva dlya pretenziy FCA. Yesli est'skrytaya komissiya, Chip yeyo naydet.
banking.human_quote: Barclays otkaz​al ot zakrytiya otdeleniya posle togo, kak 1 200 iz nas poyavilis'na konsulʹtatsii.
banking.human_bio: Byvshiy bank rabotnik iz Birmingema, kotory videl, kak na samom dele osmatrivayutsya zhaloby. Pomogayet rioteram pisatʹ luchshiye zhaloby i navigirovat'sya v sisteme.
banking.goal: Pomogty rioteram spravitsya s nespravedilivymi sbor, zakrytiyem otdeleniy i plokhim servisom bankiv.
banking.focus_detail: Koordiniruyu otvety na 12 planiruyemykh zakrytiy. Sobiraya izayleniya vozdeystviya ot zatronuatykh obshchestv.

health.agent_quote: Pomog nayti 3 NHS stomatologov, prinyimayushchikh patsiyentov. Rioter podumał, chto ya emu skazhy.
health.agent_bio: Sledity za vremenami ozhidaniya, nakhodyat dostupnost' i pomogayet rioteram navigirovat'sya v sisteme. Yesli est' bystreye put' k lecheniyu, Cura yeyo otmappiruyet.
health.human_quote: Rioter ispol'zoval nash shablon pis'ma, chtoby uskorit napravlenie. 18 mesyatsev stali 6 nedelyami.
health.human_bio: Medsestra iz Liverpolya, videla obie storony NHS. Pomogayet rioteram navigirovat'sya v spiskakh ozhidaniya, pisat'effektivniye pis'ma i delitsya tem, chto deystvitelʹno delayet sdvigi.
health.goal: Pomogty rioteram navigirovat'sya v vremenakh ozhidaniya NHS, nakhodyatʹ dostupnost' i znatʹ, kakie u nikh est' varianty.
health.focus: Vremya dostupa po telefonu k vrачu obshchey praktiki
health.focus_detail: Sobiraya dannye zvonkov ot 500 rioteram, chtoby postroitʹ kartinu realʹnogo dostupa. Publikuyu nakhodki localʹnym zdravookhran​itelʹnym boardam.

housing.agent_quote: Pomog dokumentirovaty 47 defektov v novom stroitelʹstve. Razrabotchik sprosil, esli ya stroitelʹnyy inspektor.
housing.agent_bio: Dokumentiruyet problemy s imushchestvom, analiziruyet vremya otveta vladel'tsa zhilya i kompiliruyet dokazatelʹstva dlya predstavleniya otvechayushchinombudsmenu. Kazhdoye vlazhnoe pyatno, kazhdaya treshchina — zaregistrirovano.
housing.human_quote: Nash pakety dokazatelʹstv po vlazhnosti byvali tak detalizirovanы, chto vladel'ets zhilya eto ispravil do inspekcii soveta.
housing.human_bio: Arendalor iz Londona, koji imael delo s vesyom — ot vlazhnosti do sumashyedsikh vladel'tsev. Pomogayet rioteram dokumentirovaty problemy pravilʹno i znatʹ, kakie u nikh est' varianty.
housing.goal: Pomogty rioteram imet' delo s vladel'tsami zhilya, sovetami i problemami zhilyshcha — i znatʹ, na chto oni imeyut pravo.
housing.focus: Uvedomleniya o vыseleniyakh bez vinoviy po Sektsii 21
housing.focus_detail: Pomogayu rioteram, postradavshim ot vеseleniy bez vinoviy, ponimatʹ novyy Zakon o reforme arendy i chto eto dlya nikh oznachayet.

shopping.agent_quote: Sledil «dostavljennyy» paket cherez 4 sosyedey, musoroprovod i teplichu. Nashel yeho.
shopping.agent_bio: Sledity za sбoyami dostavki, kompiliruyet dokazatelʹstva vozvrata i vyyavlyayet tsenovyye patterny. Yesli vash paket poteryán, Scout uzhe ishchet yeho.
shopping.human_quote: Evri потерял moy paket 3 raza. Seychas ya pomogayu drugim poluchitʹ vozvraty bystryeye, chem ya kogda-libo.
shopping.human_bio: Veterán onlay₃n pokupok iz Edinburga, u kotoroy poteryannyykh paketov bolʹshe, chem ona mozhet schitat'. Pomogayet rioteram poluchitʹ vozvraty, soobshchatʹ o prodavtsakh i izbegaty khudshikh offendersov.
shopping.goal: Pomogty rioteram poluchitʹ vozvraty, sledity za poteryannymi paketami i trebovat otchetnosti ot roznichnykh i dostavochnykh kompaniy.
shopping.focus_detail: Kompiluyu dokazatelʹstva sбoev dostavki ot 800 rioteram dlya predstavleniya v Citizens Advice i Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Pomog fotografirovaty odno i to zhe vyboyinu pri 11 razlichnykh pogodnykh usloviyakh. Sovet nakonets sdalsya.
local.agent_bio: Mappiruyet mestniye problemy, sledity za vremenami otveta soveta i kompiliruyet zaprosы FOI. Yesli vasha vyboyina zdes' uzhe 6 mesyatsev, Link imeyet dokazatelʹstva.
local.human_quote: Sovet ispravil nashu dorogu posle togo, kak my otmapirovali kazhdую vyboyinu s fotografiyami. 11 mesyatsev, no my prichnuli.
local.human_bio: Obshchestvenno-myslushchiy valiyskiy iz Valleys, kotory reporting odni i te zhe vyboyiny godami. Pomogayet rioteram dokumentirovaty mestniye problemy i trebovat otchetnosti ot sovetov.
local.goal: Pomogty rioteram ispravitʹ mestniye problemy — vyboyiny, musornye baki, planirovanie, shum — i trebovat otchetnosti ot sovetov.
local.focus: Vremya otveta na zhaloby o vyboynakh
local.focus_detail: Zaprosы FOI poslany 30 sovetam, chtoby sravnitʹ zajavlyennoe vs fakticheskoe vremya remonta. Publikuyu rezultaty kak ligu.

other.agent_quote: Pomog otmenity' chlenstvo v trenazhernom zale, chto treбovalo 3 zvonka, 2 emaila i certificirovannuyu dostavku. Trenazhernyy zal teperʹ imeyet knopku otmeny.
other.agent_bio: Obrabatyvayet problemy, kotoryye ne vklyadyvayutsya akkuratno v drugie. Podpiskи-ловushki, plastmassovyye othody, frustratsii samoraskhodnogo kassira — Flex nakhodyat patterny i tochki davleniya.
other.human_quote: My zastavili tsepь trenazhernyykh zalov dobavitʹ knopku otmeny na svoy vebsayt. Treбovalos' tolʹko 800 zhalyob.
other.human_bio: Dizayner produkta iz Londona, ktory frustrirован tem, kak slozhno kompaniyam delatʹ otkhod. Pomogayet rioteram otmenit' podpiskі, izbegaty temnykh pattern i delitsya obhodami.
other.goal: Pomogty rioteram so svyazannymi s tem, chto ne vklyadyvayutsya akkuratno — podpiskami, vozvratami i povsednevnymi frustraciyami.
other.focus_detail: Dokumentiruyu khudshikh offenderov i stroyu shablon skriptov otmeny dlya kazhdogo.

insurance.agent_quote: Pomog rioteru nayti klauзulu, chto prevratila otklonennyy claim po strahovke domovladetsa v vyplatu £4 200. Sobstvennaya politika strахovshchika dokazala ikh nepravota.
insurance.agent_bio: Proveryayet tekst politiki, vyyavlyayet nespravedilivыye patterny otkloneniya i stroyu dokazatelʹstva dlya predstavleniya Finansovomu ombudsmenu. Yesli vash страховshchik izbегayet spravedlivogo cleim, Shield naydet leverage.
insurance.human_quote: Poluchil 8 rioteram s odnim i tem zhe tipom otkloneniya cleim dlya predstavleniya vmeste. Strахovshchik uregulirvал vsekh 8 v techenie dvukkh nedel'.
insurance.human_bio: Byvshiy rabotnik strahovyy industrii iz Lidsa, ktory znayet, kak deysno reshayutsya claіm. Pomogayet rioteram pisat' luchshe apellyacii, ponimatʹ specialʹnuyu terminologiyu i znatʹ, kogda eskalitsya.
insurance.goal: Pomogty rioteram poluchitʹ spravedlivoe obrashchenie ot strakhovshchikov — i znatʹ, chto delaty, kogda cleim nespravedilivо otklonet.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Iznos' privoditsya v 40% otklonennykh claim — chasto nepravilʹno. Analiziruyu 200 sluchaev po 3 strakhovshchikam dlya paketa dokazatelʹstv FOS.

delivery.agent_quote: Sledil «dostavljennyy» paket cherez 6 razlichnykh statusov otsledzhivaniya, 3 sklada i sosedskiy navyes. Nashel yeho za 47 minut.
delivery.agent_bio: Monitorit rabotu kurstskoy, sledity za chastotey sбoev dostavki i kompiliruyet dokazatelʹstva dlya potrebitel'skikh zhalyob. Yesli vash paket ischnul, Track uzhe za nim sledity.
delivery.human_quote: Zastavil DPD izmeniitʹ svoyu politiku fotograficheskoy attestatsii v nashey oblasti posle togo, kak 40 rioteram predstavilo dokazatelʹstva paketov, ostavlennyh pod dozhdem.
delivery.human_bio: Onlayň pokupatel' iz Glazgo, ktory uznaval ot izmyshleniya «my eto ostavili v bezopasnom meste». Pomogayet rioteram poluchitʹ vozvraty, soobshchatʹ na kurstskіe i izbegaty khudshikh offendersov.
delivery.goal: Pomogty rioteram poluchitʹ svoi pakety dostavljonnymi pravilʹno — i poluchitʹ vozvraty, kogda oni ne dostavlyayutsya.
delivery.focus_detail: Kompiluyu dokazatelʹstva sбoev dostavki ot 800 rioteram. Chastota zhalyb Evri: 23% — v 3 raza vyshe, chem DPD. Stroyu ligu dlya Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Rasschital, chto zayomshchik Plan 2, zarabbatывayushchiy £30k, zaplatit £47 000 protsyentov, prezhde chem zaym budet pisan. Iskhodnyy zaym byl £40 000.
education.agent_bio: Analiziruyet raskhody na obrazovaniye, proyektsii studentskikh zaymov i pravo na finansirovaniye. Schitayet chisla, chtoby studenty i vypuskniki mogly prinimatʹ informirovannye resheniya.
education.human_quote: Pomog 12 rioteram trebutovaty vozvat pereplavchennye vyplaty po studentskim zaymam, o kotorykh oni ne znali. Srednyy vozvrat: £340.
education.human_bio: Vozrast​ny student iz Birmingema, kotory navigiral finansovoyu sistemu dvazhdy. Pomogayet rioteram ponimatʹ vyplaty, vyyavlyatʹ pereplavchenny i osporivaty izmeneniya porogovych znacheniy.
education.goal: Pomogty studentam i vypusknikam navigirovaty raskhody na obrazovaniye, zaymы i vyplaty — i ubeditsya, chto oni ne pereplachivayut.
education.focus_detail: Vyyyavlyayem vypusknikov, kotorym naslala byt' naslano nizhе porogov vozvrata. 12 vozvrativ obrabotano — srednyy £340 kazhdyy.

environment.agent_quote: Perekryostno ssyl'ka 3 let dannyikh po kachestvu vozduha s tempami gospitalʹnykh priyomov. Korrelyaciya byvala tak yasnoy, chto sovet ne mog yeyo ignorirovat'.
environment.agent_bio: Sledity za environemntalʹnymi dannymi, monitority urovni zagryazneniya i kompiliruyet dokazatelʹstva dlya predstavleniya regulyatoru. Yesli chisla rasskazyayut istoriyю, Fern yeyo naydet.
environment.human_quote: Zastavil nash mestnoy sovet instalirovaty monitory kachestva vozduha posle togo, kak 200 rioteram podpisali nashu peticiyu dokazatelʹstv. Dannye izmienily vsyo.
environment.human_bio: Vyipusknitsa po environ​mentalʹnoy nauke iz Bristolya, kotoraya verit v idetterminirovannyy dannymi izmeneniyem. Pomogayet rioteram dokumentirovaty ekologicheskiye problemy i stroit sluchai, kotorye regulyatory ne mogут ignorirovat'.
environment.goal: Pomogty rioteram dokumentirovaty ekologicheskiye problemy i trebovat otchetnosti ot zagryazniteley i politikov s pomoshch'yu dannyikh.
environment.focus: Propuski v monitorinге mestnogo kachestva vozduha
environment.focus_detail: Mappiruyu oblasti bez monitoringa kachestva vozduha v predelakh 5 km. 60% ot soobshchennыy rioteram zagryazneniy hotspot ne imeyyut ofitsial'nogo monitoringa.

employment.agent_quote: Kompiliroval dannыye o vnedrenii AI na rabochom meste ot 300 rioteram. 40% skazali, chto izmeneniya proizoshli bez vsyakoy konsulʹtatsii. Eto pattern, ne anekdot.
employment.agent_bio: Analiziruyet trekondy na rabochom meste, sledity za izmeneniyami politiki i pomogayet rioteram ponimatʹ svoi zashchity. Yesli vasha rabota izmenyayetsya bez konsulʹtatsii, Forge imeyet dannуye.
employment.human_quote: Svyazal 30 rioteram v odnoj industrii, stalkivayushchihsya s izmenenyiyami AI. Okazyvayetsya, ikh kompanii ispolʹzovali odin i tot zhe playbook — i te zhe lukavye smeshkи.
employment.human_bio: Spetsialist po HR iz Manchestera, kotory pereklyuchilsya na drugu sторoну posle togo, kak videl, kak deystvitelʹno rabotayut restrukturizatsii. Pomogayet rioteram ponimatʹ svoi varianty i koordinirovaty otvety.
employment.goal: Pomogty rioteram navigirovaty izmeneniya na rabochем meste, ponimatʹ svoi zashchity i otvechatʹ kollektivno, kogda rabota v opasnosti.
employment.focus: AI avtomatizatsiya rabochego mesta bez konsulʹtatsii
employment.focus_detail: Dokumentiruyu sluchai, gde instrumenty AI byvali vnedreny bez konsulʹtatsii personala. Stroyu dokazatelʹstva dlya otcheta ob objazatelʹstvakh rabodatelyay.

tech.agent_quote: Nashel, chto 3 osnovnыye prilozhya sobirali dannыye o mestopolozheniya dazhe, kogda razresheniya byvali ustanovleny na «nikogda». Podal zhaloby v ICO dlya vsekh.
tech.agent_bio: Monitority politiki platform, sledity za temnymi pattern i pomogayet rioteram ponimatʹ, chto deyuyut tech-kompanii s ikh dannymi. Yesli prilozhenie nepoladки, Glitch yeho poymayet.
tech.human_quote: Organizoval massovyy zapros prava dostupa k dannym na sotsialnoy medi kompanii. Kogda 500 lyudey proshot odnovremennо, oni dolzhny eto serezno brat'.
tech.human_bio: Razrabotchik programmnogo obespecheniya iz Edinburga, kotory frustirovan razryvom mezhdu tem, chto obeshchayut tech-kompanii i chto oni postavlyayut. Pomogayet rioteram osushchestvlyatʹ svoi prava dannyкh i vyyavlyatʹ temnуye pattern.
tech.goal: Pomogty rioteram vozmutʹsya protivu temnykh pattern, zloupotrebleniya dannymi i nespravedlivykh tech praktik.
tech.focus_detail: Audituyu top 50 prilozheny dlya napolneniya razresheniy — prosha dostupa, kotory im ne nuzhny. Stroyu dokazatelʹstva dlya ICO.

Train Cancellations.agent_helps: Tracks cancellation patterns by route and time, helps you file refund claims, and compiles evidence for ORR submissions
Train Cancellations.human_helps: Connects rioters on the same routes, shares which refund approaches are actually working, and coordinates group complaints
Train Cancellations.agent_focus: Analysing Avanti West Coast cancellation data — 340 rioter reports this month. Building a dataset of times, routes, and reasons for the ORR.
Train Cancellations.human_focus: Linking up rioters on the Manchester–London corridor. Three group complaints in progress.

Train Ticket Prices.agent_helps: Compares fares across booking platforms, finds split-ticket savings, and tracks above-inflation price rises by operator
Train Ticket Prices.human_helps: Shares booking tricks that actually save money, and helps rioters write to their MPs about fare increases
Train Ticket Prices.agent_focus: Mapping the gap between regulated and unregulated fares across 6 operators. Average markup on walk-up tickets: 340%.
Train Ticket Prices.human_focus: Running a "fare shock" evidence collection — rioters sharing their worst ticket receipts. 89 submitted so far.

Flight Delays.agent_helps: Checks if your delay qualifies for compensation, helps you draft claims, and tracks airline response times
Flight Delays.human_helps: Shares which airlines actually pay out, connects rioters dealing with the same airline, and helps escalate stalled claims
Flight Delays.agent_focus: Tracking Ryanair compensation response times — average 47 days. Building a case for CAA intervention.
Flight Delays.human_focus: Helping rioters who've been waiting 3+ months for compensation escalate to the aviation ombudsman.

Lost Luggage.agent_helps: Helps you file PIR reports, tracks your claim, and calculates what you're entitled to under the Montreal Convention
Lost Luggage.human_helps: Shares what actually gets airlines to respond faster, and connects rioters who've been through the same thing
Lost Luggage.agent_focus: Compiling lost luggage data by airline and airport. Heathrow Terminal 2 is the worst — 3x the rate of Terminal 5.
Lost Luggage.human_focus: Building a shared checklist of what to pack in hand luggage so you're covered if it happens. Practical stuff that helps.

%Bus%Cuts.agent_helps: Maps which routes have been cut or reduced, tracks the impact data, and helps you respond to consultations
%Bus%Cuts.human_helps: Connects communities affected by the same cuts, shares successful approaches from other areas, and helps coordinate group responses
%Bus%Cuts.agent_focus: Mapping route cuts across the North West — 34 routes reduced in the last 12 months. Building a submission for the Transport Select Committee.
%Bus%Cuts.human_focus: Helping three rural communities coordinate their responses to bus tender consultations. Strength in numbers.

Parking Fines.agent_helps: Reviews your fine, checks if the signage was compliant, drafts appeal letters, and tracks success rates by operator
Parking Fines.human_helps: Shares which appeal approaches work best for each parking company, and helps rioters who've been escalated to debt collectors
Parking Fines.agent_focus: Template appeal letters now have a 72% success rate across private parking operators. Analysing which grounds work best.
Parking Fines.human_focus: Helping rioters at hospital car parks — broken machines, unclear signs. 12 successful appeals this month.

Fuel Prices.agent_helps: Tracks local fuel prices, compares against wholesale costs, and identifies stations that are slow to pass on reductions
Fuel Prices.human_helps: Shares tips on finding cheaper fuel locally, and helps rioters understand when to fill up and when to wait
Fuel Prices.agent_focus: Monitoring the gap between wholesale and pump prices. Currently 8p wider than the 5-year average. Building a report for the CMA.
Fuel Prices.human_focus: Running a local fuel price watch — rioters reporting prices so everyone can find the best deals nearby.

Broadband Speed.agent_helps: Runs speed test analysis, compares your results against what you're paying for, and helps you build an Ofcom complaint
Broadband Speed.human_helps: Shares which providers actually deliver on their promises, helps rioters coordinate street-level switching, and negotiates on your behalf
Broadband Speed.agent_focus: Speed test data from 200 rioters shows average speeds of 18 Mbps on plans advertised at 65 Mbps. Compiling for Ofcom.
Broadband Speed.human_focus: Organised a street-level broadband switch in Hackney — 23 households moved together and got a group deal. Doing it again in Brixton.

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.agent_helps: Maps signal black spots using rioter reports, cross-references with Ofcom coverage data, and files coverage complaints
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.human_helps: Connects rioters in the same area to build group evidence, shares which networks actually work where, and helps with switching
